examples: You, as the community manager, are their ringleader.
Samuel Adams was widely considered to be the ringleader of the demonstration.
Natasha's mother convinced the ringleader to let Natasha train to be a tiger trainer.
Sun Microsystems, the other ringleader of the anti-Microsoft circus, is also lagging in its efforts.
The alleged ringleader was arrested, escaped from jail earlier this year, then was caught again.
